ThingDef.label: Skill book-Soul searching
ThingDef.description: A terrifying skill, in which the caster uses modified Qi tendrils to disturb the target's brain, extracting desired information from the cerebral cortex. This spell carries a risk of causing various types of brain damage, but if successful, it can extract the target’s lifelong knowledge from their mind.

li.completedLetterTitle: {PARENT_label} becomes some sparks of Qi and disappears.
li.completedLetterText: After reading {PARENT_label}, the cultivator {STUDIER_labelShort} learns the "Soul searching"!
